# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: 0
  MR_TITLE: ""
  MR_DESCRIPTION: ""
  MR_IID: ""

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

extract_mr_info:
  stage: prepare
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
  script:
    - |
      if [ "$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE" == "merge_request_event" ]; then
        export MR_TITLE="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE"
        export MR_DESCRIPTION="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION"
        export MR_IID="$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
      else
        MR_INFO=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
          "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests?state=merged&target_branch=$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH&order_by=updated_at&sort=desc&per_page=1")
        export MR_TITLE=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.[0].title // "Direct commit"')
        export MR_DESCRIPTION=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.[0].description // ""')
        export MR_IID=$(echo "$MR_INFO" | jq -r '.[0].iid // ""')
      fi
    - echo "MR_TITLE=$MR_TITLE" >> mr_info.env
    - echo "MR_DESCRIPTION<<EOF" >> mr_info.env
    - echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION" >> mr_info.env
    - echo "EOF" >> mr_info.env
    - echo "MR_IID=$MR_IID" >> mr_info.env
    - echo "MR_URL=$CI_PROJECT_URL/-/merge_requests/$MR_IID" >> mr_info.env
    - cat mr_info.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr_info.env
    paths:
      - mr_info.env
    expire_in: 1 day
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"'
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'

build_application:
  stage: build
  image: node:18-alpine
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
  script:
    - echo "Building application for MR - $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "Feature - $MR_TITLE" > build_info.txt
    - echo "MR IID - !$MR_IID" >> build_info.txt
    - echo "Commit - $CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA" >> build_info.txt
    - echo "Branch - $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" >> build_info.txt
    - echo "Build Time - $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> build_info.txt
    - npm ci
    - npm run build
    - cp build_info.txt dist/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
      - build_info.txt
    expire_in: 1 week

build_docker_image:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24-cli
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
  before_script:
    - docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
  script:
    - |
      DOCKER_TAG="${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      if [ -n "$MR_IID" ]; then
        MR_SLUG=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//' | cut -c1-50)
        DOCKER_TAG="${DOCKER_TAG}-mr${MR_IID}-${MR_SLUG}"
      fi
    - echo "Building Docker image with tag - $DOCKER_TAG"
    - |
      docker build \
        --build-arg MR_TITLE="$MR_TITLE" \
        --build-arg MR_IID="$MR_IID" \
        --build-arg CI_COMMIT_SHA="$CI_COMMIT_SHA" \
        --label "mr.title=$MR_TITLE" \
        --label "mr.iid=$MR_IID" \
        --label "git.commit=$CI_COMMIT_SHA" \
        --label "git.branch=$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" \
        -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$DOCKER_TAG \
        -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest \
        .
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$DOCKER_TAG
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
    - echo "DOCKER_TAG=$DOCKER_TAG" >> docker.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: docker.env
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"'

unit_tests:
  stage: test
  image: node:18-alpine
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
  script:
    - echo "Running tests for - $MR_TITLE"
    - npm ci
    - npm test
  coverage: '/Statements\s*:\s*(\d+\.?\d*)%/'

generate_release_notes:
  stage: test
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq
  script:
    - |
      echo "# Release Notes - $(date +%Y-%m-%d)" > release_notes.md
      echo "" >> release_notes.md
      echo "## Changes in this release" >> release_notes.md
      echo "" >> release_notes.md
      
      if [ -n "$MR_IID" ]; then
        echo "### !$MR_IID - $MR_TITLE" >> release_notes.md
        echo "" >> release_notes.md
        echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION" >> release_notes.md
        echo "" >> release_notes.md
        echo "**MR URL:** $MR_URL" >> release_notes.md
        echo "" >> release_notes.md
      fi
      
      echo "## Build Information" >> release_notes.md
      echo "" >> release_notes.md
      echo "- **Commit:** \`$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA\`" >> release_notes.md
      echo "- **Branch:** \`$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH\`" >> release_notes.md
      echo "- **Pipeline:** [#$CI_PIPELINE_ID]($CI_PIPELINE_URL)" >> release_notes.md
      echo "- **Build Date:** $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> release_notes.md
      echo "" >> release_notes.md
      
      LAST_RELEASES=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
        "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/releases?per_page=5")
      
      if [ -n "$LAST_RELEASES" ] && [ "$LAST_RELEASES" != "[]" ]; then
        echo "## Recent Releases" >> release_notes.md
        echo "" >> release_notes.md
        echo "$LAST_RELEASES" | jq -r '.[] | "- **\(.tag_name)** - \(.name) (Released: \(.released_at))"' >> release_notes.md
      fi
      
      cat release_notes.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release_notes.md
    expire_in: 1 month

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
    - unit_tests
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl openssh-client
  script:
    - |
      DEPLOY_TAG="staging-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
      if [ -n "$MR_IID" ]; then
        MR_SLUG=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//' | cut -c1-30)
        DEPLOY_TAG="staging-mr${MR_IID}-${MR_SLUG}-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)"
      fi
    - echo "Deploying to staging with tag - $DEPLOY_TAG"
    - echo "Feature being deployed - $MR_TITLE"
    - echo "DEPLOY_TAG=$DEPLOY_TAG" >> deploy.env
    - echo "ENVIRONMENT=staging" >> deploy.env
    - echo "Simulating deployment..."
    - sleep 2
    - echo "Deployment successful!"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_docker_image
    - unit_tests
    - generate_release_notes
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl git
  script:
    - |
      MR_SLUG=$(echo "$MR_TITLE" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//' | cut -c1-30)
      VERSION="v$(date +%Y.%m.%d)-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      
      if [ -n "$MR_IID" ]; then
        RELEASE_TAG="${VERSION}-mr${MR_IID}-${MR_SLUG}"
        RELEASE_NAME="Release ${VERSION}: $MR_TITLE"
      else
        RELEASE_TAG="${VERSION}"
        RELEASE_NAME="Release ${VERSION}"
      fi
    - echo "Creating production deployment with tag - $RELEASE_TAG"
    - echo "Release name - $RELEASE_NAME"
    - echo "RELEASE_TAG=$RELEASE_TAG" >> deploy.env
    - echo "RELEASE_NAME=$RELEASE_NAME" >> deploy.env
    - echo "ENVIRONMENT=production" >> deploy.env
    - |
      curl --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" \
        --data "tag_name=$RELEASE_TAG" \
        --data "name=$RELEASE_NAME" \
        --data "description=$(cat release_notes.md)" \
        --data "ref=$CI_COMMIT_SHA" \
        "$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/releases"
    - echo "Deployment to production completed"
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"'

notify_slack_build:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
    - build_application
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl jq
  script:
    - |
      DESCRIPTION_TRUNCATED=$(echo "$MR_DESCRIPTION" | head -c 200)
      if [ ${#MR_DESCRIPTION} -gt 200 ]; then
        DESCRIPTION_TRUNCATED="${DESCRIPTION_TRUNCATED}..."
      fi
      
      PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Build Completed",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "✅ Build Successful"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Feature:*\n$MR_TITLE"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*MR:*\n<$MR_URL|!$MR_IID>"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Branch:*\n\`$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH\`"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Commit:*\n\`$CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA\`"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "*Description:*\n$DESCRIPTION_TRUNCATED"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "context",
            "elements": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "Pipeline: <$CI_PIPELINE_URL|#$CI_PIPELINE_ID> | Triggered by: $GITLAB_USER_NAME"
              }
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
    - |
      if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          --data "$PAYLOAD" \
          $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not set, skipping notification"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "develop"'
  allow_failure: true

notify_slack_deployment:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine:latest
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
    - deploy_production
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache curl
  script:
    - |
      PAYLOAD=$(cat <<EOF
      {
        "text": "Deployment Completed",
        "blocks": [
          {
            "type": "header",
            "text": {
              "type": "plain_text",
              "text": "🚀 Production Deployment"
            }
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "fields": [
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Feature Deployed:*\n$MR_TITLE"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Release:*\n\`$RELEASE_TAG\`"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Environment:*\nProduction"
              },
              {
                "type": "mrkdwn",
                "text": "*Deployed by:*\n$GITLAB_USER_NAME"
              }
            ]
          },
          {
            "type": "section",
            "text": {
              "type": "mrkdwn",
              "text": "<$MR_URL|View Merge Request> | <$CI_PIPELINE_URL|View Pipeline>"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
      EOF
      )
    - |
      if [ -n "$SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL" ]; then
        curl -X POST -H 'Content-type: application/json' \
          --data "$PAYLOAD" \
          $SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not set, skipping notification"
      fi
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"'
      when: on_success
  allow_failure: true

create_commit_with_mr_info:
  stage: notify
  image: alpine/git:latest
  needs:
    - extract_mr_info
    - deploy_production
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git
  script:
    - git config --global user.email "ci@example.com"
    - git config --global user.name "GitLab CI"
    - |
      COMMIT_MESSAGE="Deploy: $MR_TITLE

      MR: !$MR_IID
      Release: $RELEASE_TAG
      Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA
      
      Deployed to production on $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)
      
      $MR_DESCRIPTION"
    - echo "$COMMIT_MESSAGE" > deployment_commit_message.txt
    - cat deployment_commit_message.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - deployment_commit_message.txt
    expire_in: 1 month
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "main" || $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == "master"'
      when: on_success
  allow_failure: true
